title: rubus radula subsp. aspericaulis
intro: Rubus radula subsp. aspericaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a subspecies of shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus radula subsp. aspericaulis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
